message:
chore(release): bump version to 0.1.5

Release v0.1.5 includes:

## Bug Fixes

### DateTime Comparison Fix (Critical)
- Fixed flaky test `test_file_reservation_conflict_ttl_transition_allows_after_expiry`
- Root cause: SQLite stores datetimes without timezone info (naive), but
  code was comparing with timezone-aware Python datetimes
- Added `_naive_utc()` helper that converts aware datetimes to naive UTC
  for safe SQLite comparisons
- Fixed 5 datetime comparisons in app.py file reservation expiry logic
- Added `_ensure_utc_dt()` helper in cli.py for consistent timezone handling

### Placeholder Detection (User Experience)
- Server-side validation in `_get_project_by_identifier()` and `_get_agent()`
  now detects common placeholder patterns like 'YOUR_PROJECT_PATH'
- Returns clear CONFIGURATION_ERROR with fix instructions instead of
  cryptic NOT_FOUND errors
- Shell hooks (check_inbox.sh, codex_notify.sh) silently exit when
  placeholders detected instead of making failed API calls
- Install scripts use 'YOUR_AGENT_NAME' placeholder when server not
  running, with clear warnings about reconfiguration

### Script Improvements
- Standardized placeholder detection patterns across all shell hooks
- Cleaned up redundant variable assignments in Gemini integration script

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
